title: lithocarpus blaoensis
intro: Lithocarpus blaoensis, also known as the Blao stone oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family, Fagaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Vietnamese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus blaoensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often combined with other medicinal herbs in traditional Vietnamese remedies.
